description: Choose the type of conversation you'd like to practice. Each type offers a different learning experience.

small_talk.label: Small Talk
small_talk.description: Practice casual and everyday conversations to build fluency and confidence.

scenario_roleplay.label: Scenario Roleplay
scenario_roleplay.description: Act out realistic scenarios and roles for immersive language learning.

exam_practice.label: Exam Practice
exam_practice.description: Prepare for language exams with focused practice on common test situations.

topic_exploration.label: Topic Exploration
topic_exploration.description: Engage in in-depth discussions about various topics to expand your vocabulary and comprehension.

oxford_debate.label: Oxford Debate
oxford_debate.description: Participate in a structured debate format to develop persuasive and critical thinking skills.
